name: code-implement-and-review
objectives: Decompose the operator's task into independent work items and implement each within the declared scope; avoid scope creep. Independent items run in parallel as cheap-tier (sonnet) workers; a single item with no decomposition still runs as one worker.

Run ONE adversarial craft-gate review of the MERGED diff and iterate (max 3, only on CHANGES_REQUIRED) until the verdict is APPROVED on merit — never auto-approving a cap as a clean pass. The gate reviews merged output once per convergence cycle (not once per item) and anchors each finding to its work item.
